name: Hot Couscous Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine 1/4 cup water and the orange peel.
Bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the couscous.
3. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Transfer the couscous to a serving bowl.
5. Top with almonds and half-and-half.
Weight Watchers Exchanges: 1 Fat, 1/2 Protein, 1 Bread, 25 Optional Calories.
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 210 calories, 7 g protein, 9 g fat, 26 g carbohydrates, 61 mg calcium, 11 mg sodium, 6 mg cholesterol, 1 g dietary fiber (excluding couscous).
Calories from fat: 36.7%
Original recipe from Weight Watchers "Simply Light Cooking" Conversion and additional nutritional analysis by Rick Weissgerber.
